dialogue [triples... | path.json | -].description: Generate multi-speaker dialogue with `eleven_v3`. Accepts a JSON file (array of {text, voice_id}), colon-delimited `label:voice_id:text` positional triples, or `-` for stdin JSON. Routes to one of four endpoints based on --stream/--with-timestamps.

align <audio> <transcript|path>.description: Forced alignment: aligns a known transcript to an audio recording, returning per-character and per-word start/end timings plus a loss value. Prefer --transcript-file for multi-line or path-like text.
